title: Saras Loorne

{{Dialogue|Starstone|What about Master Loorne and the others?|Shryne|Still no response from any of them. And not because of signal jamming. They've been killed.|Chatak|Draw on your training, Padawan. They're with the Force.|attr=Fellow Jedi Olee Starstone, Bol Chatak and Roan Shryne|src=<ref name="DL" />}}
'''Saras Loorne''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Loorne, along with five other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] task force, was dispatched to occupy the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]], a [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] stronghold. During the [[Battle of Murkhana (Clone Wars)|battle]], [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]—an [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|order]] for the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Troop/Legends|troopers]] to [[Death/Legends|execute]] their Jedi [[Officer/Legends|officers]]—was issued, and Loorne and the two [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] accompanying him were killed by the clones of the [[22nd Air Combat Wing]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|General Loorne and the two Jedi Knights he arrived with were ambushed and killed. Apparently no troopers among the Twenty-second staked a claim to the moral high ground.|Clone Commander Salvo|<ref name="DL" />}}
Saras Loorne was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who lived during the last [[Time/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] broke out, Loorne served as a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] with the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Near the end of the war<ref name="DL" /> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="TERC" /> Loorne, along with five other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and a contingent of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] under the command of [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Salvo (clone trooper)|Salvo]], was dispatched to invade the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]], home to the Confederacy-allied [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]].<ref name="DL" />

The Republic [[Task force/Legends|task force]] was ordered to rendezvous in the [[Murkhana system/Legends|Murkhana system]], and after one [[Standard week/Legends|week]], they began their [[Battle of Murkhana (Clone Wars)|attack]]. Upon touching down on the planet in [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunships]], the Republic [[Troop/Legends|troops]] were greeted by Confederate [[Missile/Legends|rocket]] fire, but Loorne survived the attack. When Master [[Roan Shryne]] [[Force sense/Legends|reached out]] for Loorne with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] in order to find out if the Jedi Master was still alive, Loorne answered him affirmatively. After successfully landing on the surface, Republic and Separatist troops engaged each other in combat. In the midst of the battle, the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] received [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]—a [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|dispatch]] for all clone troopers to [[Death/Legends|slay]] their Jedi [[Officer/Legends|officers]]. Loorne and the two Jedi Knights who accompanied him were ambushed and executed by clones of the [[22nd Air Combat Wing]]. The bodies of Loorne and the two Jedi Knights were later shown to the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Executor]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], during his visit to Murkhana, by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Salvo. The Commander also gave the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] of the Jedi to Vader, who then ordered Salvo to dispose of the bodies.<ref name="DL" />

==Personality and traits==
Saras Loorne, a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] male, possessed the knowledge and skills required to become a Jedi Master, and was placed in command of the Murkhana mission above Masters Shryne and [[Bol Chatak]]. However, he was unable to defend himself against the clone troopers, resulting in his death.<ref name="DL" />

==Behind the scenes==
Saras Loorne first appeared in the [[2005]] novel ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'', written by [[James Luceno]].<ref name="DL" /> Loorne later received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', albeit he was mistakenly named "Sares Loorne."<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|261|Loorne, Sares}}</ref>
